prompt: Create an elegant editorial studio portrait poster for ABKR. Use a square canvas with a warm off-white textured paper background. Center a large rounded-rectangle photo panel in very dark forest green, leaving generous cream margins. Inside the panel, show a photorealistic waist-up portrait of a young Black man with deep brown skin, short close-cropped black hair, clean-shaven face, defined jawline, full lips, straight nose, and expressive dark eyes looking off to the viewer’s left. He wears a plain black crewneck T-shirt with a small gold handwritten signature logo reading Abkr across the chest. Pose him three-quarter view with shoulders angled slightly left and head turned left, calm confident expression, soft studio lighting, crisp skin detail, natural shadows, premium fashion look. At the top, set the large spaced serif letters A B K R in dark green, centered, with a thin gold ornamental divider beneath it. At the bottom right, add small gold issue numbering 01 with a thin horizontal line below. Minimal luxury branding, refined typography, muted color palette of cream, dark green, black, and gold, high-end magazine cover aesthetic, no extra text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create an elegant editorial studio portrait poster for ABKR. Use a square canvas with a warm off-white textured paper background. Center a large rounded-rectangle photo panel in very dark forest green, leaving generous cream margins. Inside the panel, show a photorealistic waist-up portrait of a young Black man with deep brown skin, short close-cropped black hair, clean-shaven face, defined jawline, full lips, straight nose, and expressive dark eyes looking off to the viewer’s left. He wears a plain black crewneck T-shirt with a small gold handwritten signature logo reading Abkr across the chest. Pose him three-quarter view with shoulders angled slightly left and head turned left, calm confident expression, soft studio lighting, crisp skin detail, natural shadows, premium fashion look. At the top, set the large spaced serif letters A B K R in dark green, centered, with a thin gold ornamental divider beneath it. At the bottom right, add small gold issue numbering 01 with a thin horizontal line below. Minimal luxury branding, refined typography, muted color palette of cream, dark green, black, and gold, high-end magazine cover aesthetic, no extra text, no watermark.
promptZh: 为 ABKR 创建一张优雅的编辑式影棚人像海报。使用方形画布，背景为暖米白色纹理纸。在中心放置一个深森林绿色的圆角矩形照片面板，四周留出宽裕的奶油色边距。面板内展示一位年轻黑人男性的写实半身肖像，他拥有深棕色皮肤、短寸黑发、面部干净、下颌线分明、嘴唇丰满、鼻梁挺直，深邃的眼睛看向观众左侧。他身穿一件纯黑色圆领 T 恤，胸前印有小巧的金色手写签名 Logo，文字为 Abkr。采用四分之三侧面姿势，双肩略微向左倾斜，头部转向左侧，表情沉稳自信，柔和的影棚光线，皮肤细节清晰，自然阴影，呈现高端时尚感。顶部居中放置大号间距衬线字母 A B K R，颜色为深绿色，下方配有一条纤细的金色装饰分割线。右下角添加小号金色期号 01，下方配有一条水平细线。极简奢华品牌风格，精致的排版，采用奶油色、深绿色、黑色和金色的柔和色调，具备高端杂志封面美感，无额外文字，无水印。
